summary: Completed testing of CryptonAI new features: 1) Interactive news with modal, bookmark, share, external link - ALL WORKING, 2) Admin Statistics tab with 7-day trend charts - ALL WORKING. Fixed duplicate /api/admin/stats endpoint bug in server.py.

issues: News cards missing data-testid attribute for easier Playwright testing - use data-testid='news-item-{id}'

action_items: Add data-testid to news cards in index.tsx for better testing automation
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Duplicate /api/admin/stats endpoint - first endpoint (lines 1085-1110) was overriding the enhanced version (lines 1369-1474). Removed the first definition.
Code quality: admin.tsx is 1500+ lines - consider splitting into smaller components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) News modal with impact_reason ('Pourquoi c'est haussier/baissier'), bookmark, share, external link buttons, 2) Admin Stats tab shows CSS bar charts for 7-day registrations, community activity, role distribution. Backend /api/admin/stats returns trends.daily_registrations, trends.daily_activity, distributions.roles.

tests_performed.description: jcuradeau.7@gmail.com / JacksoN12. - Dashboard loads with 'Bonjour, Mike price'
News section visible with category filters (Tout, Macro, Institutionnel, Tech, Régulation, Sécurité)
News cards show impact badge (Haussier/Baissier/Neutre) and impact_reason text (e.g. 'Hausse des prix')
Clicking news card opens detailed modal with image, title, summary, tags
Modal shows prominent section: 'Pourquoi c'est haussier ? Hausse des prix'
Bookmark icon in modal header (top right)
'Lire l'article complet' button visible (opens external URL)
New 'Statistiques' tab in admin panel header tabs
'Inscriptions (7 derniers jours)' bar chart with Sun-Sat labels and counts
'Activité communautaire' stacked bar chart with Posts/Commentaires legend
'Répartition des rôles' with progress bars: Utilisateurs 33%, Admins 0%, Super Admins 67%
Returns overview, trends.daily_registrations (7 days), trends.daily_activity, distributions.roles, distributions.categories
News articles include impact_reason field (e.g. 'Hausse des prix', 'Adoption massive')

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Duplicate /api/admin/stats endpoint definition - first simple version (lines 1085-1110) was overriding enhanced version with trends (lines 1369-1474)
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Removed the first duplicate definition, keeping only the enhanced version with trends data

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are fully functional
